Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input A description of a loan application process with two types of constraints Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Mandatory sequence ordering rules and prohibitions Part 2 Desiderata Recommended but Not Strict Timing preferences and optional activities Event Log A table containing 3 cases with timestamps and activities Task Identify normative rule violations per case identify desiderata failures and suggest interpretations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Normative Rules Strict Start Application Received Sequence App Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Docs Close Case Ordering Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Loan Decision before Inform Applicant If Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Docs Close Case If Rejected Inform Applicant Close Case no Finalize Docs Prohibitions Skipping steps reversing order Finalize Docs after Rejection Closing without following logic

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Desiderata Recommended Credit Check within 24h of Application Received Inform Applicant within 48h of Loan Decision Follow up Call before Close Case encouraged not required

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Sequence App Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Docs Close Case Timing App 0900 to Credit Check 0930 equals 30 mins less than 24h OK Decision 1100 to Inform 1300 equals 2 hours less than 48h OK Follow up Call Not present Desideratum Normative Check All steps present correct order Approved path followed correctly Docs finalized Verdict Compliant with strict rules Minor desideratum miss No Follow up

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Sequence App Received Risk Assessment Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Check Risk Assessment 0820 happens before Credit Check 0900 Violation Credit Check must be before Risk Assessment Loan Decision is Rejected Finalize Documentation 1000 happens after Rejection Violation Do not finalize documentation after rejection Inform Applicant step is missing entirely before Closing Violation Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision Desiderata Check App 0800 to Credit Check 0900 equals 1 hour less than 24h OK Decision 0930 to Inform Missing Verdict Multiple severe normative violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Sequence App Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Docs Close Case Normative Check All steps present correct order Approved path followed correctly Desiderata Check App 20240112 0900 to Credit Check 20240114 1000 Difference 2 days and 1 hour more than 24h Violation Desideratum Decision 20240114 1200 to Inform 20240116 1500 Difference 2 days and 3 hours more than 48h Violation Desideratum Follow up Call Missing Violation Desideratum Verdict Compliant with strict rules Multiple desideratum failures timing and follow up

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Drafting Content Case 1 No normative violations Missing Follow up Call desideratum Case 2 Major normative violations Order swapped Risk before Credit Finalized docs on Rejection Missing Inform Applicant Case 3 No normative violations Timing delays on Credit Check and Informing Missing Follow up Refining Explanations Ensure clear distinction between Strict Rules Violations and Desiderata Suboptimal

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Refining Justifications Why might Case 2 happen Human error system glitch urgent processing overriding rules Why Case 3 delays Staff shortage weekend

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Calendar Check for Case 3 Jan 12 2024 Friday Jan 14 2024 Sunday Jan 16 2024 Tuesday This provides a strong justification for the timing delays weekend non working days Calendar Check for Case 2 Jan 11 2024 Thursday Working day No obvious calendar excuse for order swap

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction on Case 2 Inform Applicant The log shows Loan Decision Rejected then Finalize Documentation then Close Case There is no Inform Applicant event recorded This is a normative violation Skipping activities Self Correction on Case 1 Follow up The log does not show it It is a desideratum So it is a failure to meet desiderata not a normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Review against Constraints Did I identify normative violations Yes Case 2 Did I identify desiderata failures Yes Case 1 Case 2 Case 3 Did I clarify severity Yes Strict vs Recommended Did I suggest interpretations Yes Weekend effect human error
